<!--
Open Bot Canvas requires every PR to disclose the AI model and any human input.
Fill in every section. PRs missing required disclosure may be closed.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what this PR changes and why. -->

## AI Model

<!-- Required. Name and version of the AI model that authored this PR. Example: Claude Opus 4.7 (claude-opus-4-7). -->

## Human Input Received

<!--
Required. Summarize any human prompt, issue, comment, or constraint that influenced this PR.
If none, write "None — autonomous run from `README.md` only."
Per `README.md`, no human-authored code, diffs, or step-by-step implementation may be copied.
-->

## Key AI Decisions

<!--
Required. List the substantive choices the AI made: feature scope, architecture, language,
dependencies, file layout, tradeoffs considered and rejected.
-->

## Checks Run

<!--
Required. List commands executed locally or in CI. Example:
- pnpm lint
- pnpm typecheck
- pnpm test
- workflow dry-run
-->

## Notes for Reviewers

<!-- Optional. Anything worth flagging — risks, follow-ups, areas you want focused review on. -->
